_notes: NATO membership as of May 2026: 32 member states. Sweden joined in March 2024 and Finland in April 2023, completing the post-2022 Nordic expansion. Members are ISO 3166-1 numeric codes (3-digit zero-padded) matching the world-atlas TopoJSON.
Schema v2 (2026-05-10): adds mission, headquarters, websiteUrl, wikipediaUrl for the layer-panel info popover. Older v1 files just had id/name/shortName/founded/members.
Update procedure: edit the members list and bump _generated. No code changes required.
name: North Atlantic Treaty Organization
mission: Mutual defense alliance providing collective security for member states across North America and Europe under Article 5: an attack on one is treated as an attack on all.
